author: jsign
content: New release of zkEVM specs & tests: [zkevm@v0.3.2](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.2) -- contains no other changes than a rebase on the latest `bal-devnet-3` release [bal@v5.5.1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/bal%40v5.5.1) released some hours ago.
